transcript.speaker: Nina
transcript.text: I saw your note and the open renewal risk. Tell me what happened from your side.

transcript.speaker: Eli
transcript.text: I have been asking for a real fix for three weeks. Every update makes me explain the same problem again.

transcript.speaker: Eli
transcript.text: The sync failed again yesterday. We are up for renewal next month, and I am ready to cancel.

transcript.speaker: Nina
transcript.text: You should not have had to repeat this. I am going to stay with the issue and give you a clear plan before we leave.

transcript.speaker: Eli
transcript.text: A plan is not enough. I need to know whether we are locked in.

transcript.speaker: Nina
transcript.text: Your renewal date is August 31. The agreement is still in its notice window, so no renewal is locked in today.

transcript.speaker: Eli
transcript.text: Then give me one reason not to send notice now.

transcript.speaker: Nina
transcript.text: The fastest save path is a named support owner, a sync review today, and a written checkpoint in forty eight hours. I can own all three.

transcript.speaker: Eli
transcript.text: The last ticket says resolved, but it was not resolved.

transcript.speaker: Nina
transcript.text: I have TKT-8821 open. The resolution note only covered the import job. It did not verify the nightly sync. I will reopen it with that gap called out.

transcript.speaker: Eli
transcript.text: Who is actually accountable after this call?

transcript.speaker: Nina
transcript.text: I am. I will send the owner and review time in writing in the next hour. You do not need to wait until next week for an update.

transcript.speaker: Eli
transcript.text: All right. Send it today. I will hold the notice until we see the review.

suggestions.title: Name the impact
suggestions.content: Acknowledge that Eli had to repeat the issue. Promise a clear plan before the call ends.
suggestions.reason: The customer said three weeks of updates had not produced a real fix.
suggestions.useEvidence: Nina named the repeated effort and promised a plan at 00:24.

suggestions.title: Contract detail
suggestions.content: AGR-2088 renews on August 31. The account is still inside the notice window.
suggestions.reason: The customer asked whether the renewal was already locked in.
suggestions.useEvidence: Nina stated the renewal date and notice status at 00:40.

suggestions.title: Three part save flow
suggestions.content: Offer a named support owner, a sync review today, and a written checkpoint in 48 hours.
suggestions.reason: The customer asked for one concrete reason to delay cancellation notice.
suggestions.useEvidence: Nina offered all three parts of the save flow at 00:56.

suggestions.title: Ticket resolution gap
suggestions.content: TKT-8821 verified the import job. It did not verify the nightly sync.
suggestions.reason: The customer challenged the resolved status on the latest ticket.
suggestions.useEvidence: Nina separated the import check from the sync check at 01:13.

suggestions.title: Ask for a notice hold
suggestions.content: Ask Eli to hold the cancellation notice for 7 days while the save flow runs.
suggestions.reason: The customer asked who would be accountable after the call.

gaps.after: request for a reason to stay
